## What's the issue?

- [ ] Typo or broken link
- [ ] Unclear wording
- [ ] Factual claim that contradicts another public source (please link it)
- [ ] Outdated reference (section no longer reflects current public posture)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

*Note: external pull requests are not accepted for this documentation — please
file an issue instead, and we will address the correction in a subsequent
internal commit.*
